artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of FMCS domain transfer approaches. Recommends FMCSTransfer structure with embedding/retraction pair to transfer temporal coherence from CanonicalMCS to target domains (Z, Q). Identifies key challenges: Preorder-vs-LinearOrder mismatch, witness inclusion, retraction surjectivity.

partial_progress.details: Full analysis of transfer approaches, Mathlib support, and implementation strategy

research_findings.main_approach: FMCSTransfer structure with order embedding plus compatible retraction
research_findings.key_insight: CanonicalMCS provides sorry-free temporal coherence; transfer along embeddings rather than proving directly
challenges: CanonicalMCS has Preorder, not LinearOrder - requires chain extraction or quotient
Retraction must be monotone and compatible with embedding
Witness inclusion requires embedding to preserve strict order
existing_infrastructure: DurationTransfer.lean - algebraic structure transfer via OrderIso
IntBFMCS.lean - chain construction (partial, has F/P sorries)
CanonicalEmbedding.lean - Cantor isomorphism approach (partial, has F/P sorries)
